description: Add homepage URL to the Notion plugin. Although Notion uses wildcard subdomains, www.notion.so is the universal entry point.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/notion && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Notion plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://www.notion.so' to both the Notion plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: NotionPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://www.notion.so' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/notion/src/index.ts (add homepage property to NotionPlugin class)
- plugins/notion/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The NotionPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class NotionPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'notion';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Notion';
  override readonly displayName = 'Notion';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.notion.so/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.notion.so/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://www.notion.so';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://www.notion.so"
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
